testcase.name: Example Test > should work
getSizes > should return undefined if width or layout is missing
getSizes > should return fixed size for fixed layout
getSizes > should return fullWidth size for fullWidth layout
getSizes > should return constrained size for constrained layout
getSizes > should return undefined for other layouts
getImagesOptimized > should use imageSizes when width is smaller than smallest deviceSize
getAsset > should return the correct asset link
getAsset > should handle nested paths
getAsset > should handle paths with leading slash
getAsset > should handle empty path
trimSlash > should remove leading and trailing slashes
trimSlash > should return empty string if input is only slashes
trimSlash > should return empty string for empty input
getHomePermalink > should return the correct home permalink
getBlogPermalink > should return the correct blog permalink
getBlogPermalink > should return a string
getBlogPermalink > should start with a slash
sanitize utility > edge cases > should return an empty string for null input
sanitize utility > edge cases > should return an empty string for undefined input
sanitize utility > edge cases > should return an empty string for an empty string input
sanitize utility > allowed formatting tags > should allow basic formatting tags
sanitize utility > allowed formatting tags > should allow structural tags
sanitize utility > allowed formatting tags > should allow heading tags
sanitize utility > allowed formatting tags > should allow code and pre tags
sanitize utility > allowed formatting tags > should allow br and span tags
sanitize utility > links and schemes > should allow a tags with permitted attributes
sanitize utility > links and schemes > should allow permitted URL schemes
sanitize utility > links and schemes > should strip disallowed URL schemes
sanitize utility > SVG support > should allow svg and child elements with attributes
sanitize utility > SVG support > should handle camelCase input by lowercasing it in the output for SVG tags/attributes
sanitize utility > global attributes > should allow class, id, aria-hidden, and role on tags
sanitize utility > XSS prevention > should strip disallowed tags and their content if they are risky
sanitize utility > XSS prevention > should strip disallowed tags but keep content if they are safe structural tags
sanitize utility > XSS prevention > should strip disallowed attributes
toUiAmount > should handle 0 correctly
toUiAmount > should format numbers < 1000 correctly
toUiAmount > should format thousands correctly
toUiAmount > should format millions correctly
toUiAmount > should format billions correctly
toUiAmount > should handle negative numbers correctly
toUiAmount > should handle rounding edge cases consistently
